 const previewElem = document.getElementById("preview"); const startBtn = document.getElementById("start"); async function startRecording() { previewElem.srcObject = await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({ video: true, audio: true, }); } startBtn.addEventListener("click", startRecording);

注意：要使用Web Share API ，您需要用户进行交互。 例如，按钮点击或触摸事件。

剪贴板 API允许您读取数据并将数据写入剪贴板。 这对于实现复制到剪贴板功能很有用。

 async function copyHandler() { const text = "https://tapajyoti-bose.vercel.app/"; navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); }

有没有想过YouTube如何防止屏幕在播放视频时被关闭？ 好吧，那是因为Screen Wake Lock API 。

 let wakeLock = null; async function lockHandler() { wakeLock = await navigator.wakeLock.request("screen"); } async function releaseHandler() { await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock = null; }

原文:

With the rapidly changing technologies, developers are being provided with incredible new tools and APIs. But it has been seen that out of the 100+ APIs, only 5% of them are actively used by developers.

Let's take a look at some of the useful Web APIs that can help you skyrocket your website to the moon!🌕🚀

1. Screen Capture API

The Screen Capture API, as the name suggests, allows you to capture the contents of a screen, making the process of building a screen recorder a piece of cake.

You need a video element to display the captured screen. The start button will start the screen capture.

<video id="preview" autoplay> Your browser doesn't support HTML5.
</video>
<button id="start" class="btn">Start</button>

const previewElem = document.getElementById("preview");
const startBtn = document.getElementById("start"); async function startRecording() { previewElem.srcObject = await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({ video: true, audio: true, });
} startBtn.addEventListener("click", startRecording);

2. Web Share API

The Web Share API allows you to share text, links, and even files from a web page to other apps installed on the device.

async function shareHandler() { navigator.share({ title: "Tapajyoti Bose | Portfolio", text: "Check out my website", url: "https://tapajyoti-bose.vercel.app/", });
}

NOTE: To use the Web Share API, you need an interaction from the user. For example, a button click or a touch event.

3. Intersection Observer API

The Intersection Observer API allows you to detect when an element enters or leaves the viewport. This is exceptionally useful for implementing infinite scroll.

NOTE: The demo uses React because of my personal preference, but you can use any framework or vanilla JavaScript.

4. Clipboard API

The Clipboard API allows you to read and write data to the clipboard. This is useful for implementing the copy to clipboard functionality.

async function copyHandler() { const text = "https://tapajyoti-bose.vercel.app/"; navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
}

5. Screen Wake Lock API

Ever wondered how YouTube prevents the screen from being switched off while playing the video? Well, that's because of the Screen Wake Lock API.

let wakeLock = null; async function lockHandler() { wakeLock = await navigator.wakeLock.request("screen");
} async function releaseHandler() { await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock = null;
}

NOTE: You can only use the Screen Wake Lock API if the page is already visible on the screen. Otherwise, it would throw an error.

6. Screen Orientation API

The Screen Orientation API allows you to check the current orientation of the screen and even lock it to a specific orientation.

async function lockHandler() { await screen.orientation.lock("portrait");
} function releaseHandler() { screen.orientation.unlock();
} function getOrientation() { return screen.orientation.type;
}

7. Fullscreen API

The Fullscreen API allows you to display an element or the entire page in full screen.

async function enterFullscreen() { await document.documentElement.requestFullscreen();
} async function exitFullscreen() { await document.exitFullscreen();
}

NOTE: To use the Fullscreen API too, you need an interaction from the user.

Items.Title: 什么是 DNS，它是如何工作的？ | What is DNS and how does it work?
Items.Description:
亚历山德罗斯·库蒂斯

发布于 2 月 21 日

当您在浏览器中输入 URL 时，它会向最近的 DNS 解析器发送 DNS 查询。

  • 您的 ISP 或其他提供商通常会提供 DNS 解析器。 它缓存经常访问的 IP 地址，因此可以更快地解决查询，从而节省时间并减少网络流量。
  • 根服务器：这些是 DNS 系统的核心，它们维护着顶级域 (TLD) 服务器的数据库。 他们负责处理对 TLD 服务器的请求。
  • 权威服务器：这些服务器负责保存域名的 IP 地址。

    • 详细功能

    当您在 Web 浏览器中键入域名时，浏览器会向最近的 DNS 解析器发送 DNS 查询，然后由后者将请求转发给根服务器。 根服务器响应所请求域名的顶级域的 TLD 服务器的位置。 然后 DNS 解析器联系 TLD 服务器并请求所请求域名的 IP 地址。 然后 DNS 解析器联系权威服务器并请求所请求域名的 IP 地址。 如果权威服务器在其数据库中有 IP 地址，它会使用 IP 地址进行响应，然后 DNS 解析器将其返回给 DNS 客户端。

    最后，DNS 客户端使用 IP 地址与托管所请求网站的 Web 服务器建立连接，并在浏览器中加载该网站。

    Alexandros Kourtis

    Posted on Feb 21

    DNS, which stands for Domain Name System, is a system that translates human-readable domain names, such as example.com, into IP addresses, which are used by computers to identify each other on the Internet.

    The DNS system is composed of several components, including:

    1. DNS clients: These are typically your internet-connected devices, such as your computer, phone, or tablet. When you enter a URL into your browser, it sends a DNS query to the nearest DNS resolver.
    2. DNS resolvers: These are servers that are responsible for looking up IP addresses for domain names. Your ISP or another provider typically provides the DNS resolver. It caches frequently accessed IP addresses, so the queries are resolved more quickly, which saves time and reduces network traffic.
    3. Root servers: These are the core of the DNS system, and they maintain a database of top-level domain (TLD) servers. They are responsible for handling requests for TLD servers.
    4. TLD servers: These servers are responsible for resolving queries for domain names with specific top-level domains, such as .com, .net, or .org.
    5. Authoritative servers: These servers are responsible for holding the IP addresses for domain names.

    Detailed functionality

    When you type a domain name into your web browser, the browser sends a DNS query to the nearest DNS resolver, which then forwards the request to the root server. The root server responds with the location of the TLD server for the top-level domain of the requested domain name. The DNS resolver then contacts the TLD server and requests the IP address for the requested domain name. The TLD server responds with the location of the authoritative server responsible for the requested domain name. The DNS resolver then contacts the authoritative server and requests the IP address for the requested domain name. If the authoritative server has the IP address in its database, it responds with the IP address, which the DNS resolver then returns to the DNS client.

    Finally, the DNS client uses the IP address to establish a connection with the web server that hosts the requested website, and the website is loaded in the browser.

作为一个曾与精神或情感障碍作斗争的人，我理解情感支持动物 (ESA) 对一个人的情感康复的深远影响。 他们的陪伴和身体存在可以帮助减少焦虑、抑郁和孤独感。

这对于经历惊恐发作或其他焦虑症状的人特别有帮助。

它们可以作为对话的开场白或在公共场合与他人互动的理由。

总的来说，ESA 可以提供的情感支持和陪伴可能是一个人情感康复过程中很有价值的一部分。 然而，请务必注意，ESA 不能替代专业的心理健康治疗，个人应始终与获得许可的心理健康专家合作制定全面的治疗计划。

哪些宠物可以成为情感支持动物？

任何家养动物在技术上都可以成为情感支持动物 (ESA)，只要它为其主人提供情感支持并且不对他人构成威胁或干扰。 然而，用作 ESA 的最常见动物类型是狗和猫，因为它们随处可见、易于训练并且通常非常适合与人类一起在室内生活。

也就是说，其他类型的动物也可以成为出色的情感支持动物，这取决于个人的需要和偏好。 这是情感支持动物的列表：

  • 鸟类，例如鹦鹉或金丝雀
  • 兔子
  • 豚鼠
  • 仓鼠
  • 雪貂
  • 微型马

原文:

As someone who has struggled with mental or emotional disabilities, I understand the profound impact that an emotional support animal (ESA) can have on one's emotional healing. The love and support that an ESA provides are immeasurable, and it can make all the difference when navigating life's challenges. There are several ways in which an ESA can provide emotional support:

1. Comfort: ESAs can provide comfort to their owners simply by being present. Their companionship and physical presence can help reduce feelings of anxiety, depression, and loneliness.

2. Stress Reduction: ESAs can help reduce stress by providing a calming effect and a sense of security. This can be particularly helpful for people who experience panic attacks or other symptoms of anxiety.

3. Improved Mood: Spending time with an ESA can increase levels of the hormone oxytocin, which can help improve mood and decrease stress levels.

4. Increased Physical Activity: Caring for an ESA, such as taking them for walks or playing with them, can help increase physical activity and improve overall health.

5. Social Interaction: ESAs can help facilitate social interaction for their owners. They can serve as a conversation starter or a reason to engage with others while in public.

Overall, the emotional support and companionship that an ESA can provide can be a valuable part of a person's emotional healing process. It's important to note, however, that ESAs are not a substitute for professional mental health treatment, and individuals should always work with a licensed mental health professional to develop a comprehensive treatment plan.

Which Pets can be emotional support animals?

Any domesticated animal can technically be an emotional support animal (ESA), as long as it provides emotional support to its owner and does not pose a threat or disturbance to others. However, the most common types of animals used as ESAs are dogs and cats, as they are widely available, easy to train, and generally well-suited for living indoors with humans.

That being said, other types of animals can also make excellent emotional support animals, depending on an individual's needs and preferences. Here's a list of emotional support animals:

  • Birds, such as parrots or canaries
  • Rabbits
  • Guinea pigs
  • Hamsters
  • Ferrets
  • Miniature horses
  • Fish or other aquatic animals
